_paths_note: Data / checkpoint / tokenizer paths are NOT set here. They come from config/paths.py (env-driven, default to Google Drive). Leave the *_path / *_dir / init_from / resume_from fields null to use those defaults; set an absolute path only to override.

pretrain._steps_note: Corpus ~97M tokens; ~131K tokens/step at this config => ~740 steps/epoch. 8000 steps ~ 10 effective epochs.
pretrain._keep_note: save_every=100 writes step_100.pt, step_200.pt, ... plus latest.pt. keep_last_n=5 keeps only the 5 newest step_*.pt to bound Drive usage (each ckpt ~ model+optimizer state). Set keep_last_n=0 to keep ALL checkpoints.

sft._mask_note: mask_prompt=true => loss is computed ONLY on the assistant answer. assistant_marker_ids = token IDs for '▁Assistant' + ':' (11109, 32). Everything up to and including this marker is set to -100. Verified against the actual data template: 'User: ... Assistant: ...'. The on-disk data is NOT changed.
